onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set oc_difficulty to {{oc_difficulty}}]
Set overall game difficulty to {{oc_difficulty}}. Easy=slow drops, long grace; Normal=balanced; Hard=fast drops, short grace.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set oc_physics_feel to {{oc_physics_feel}}]
Set physics feel to {{oc_physics_feel}}. Floaty=low gravity+high bounce; Balanced=default; Heavy=high gravity+low bounce.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set oc_juice to {{oc_juice}}]
Set feedback intensity to {{oc_juice}}. Controls score pulse, floating tag duration, and animation drama.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set ot_gravity to {{ot_gravity}}]
Set gravity to {{ot_gravity}} px/s² in the game physics.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set ot_restitution to {{ot_restitution}}]
Set restitution to {{ot_restitution}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set ot_drop_cooldown to {{ot_drop_cooldown}}]
Set drop cooldown to {{ot_drop_cooldown}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/category.schema.json, set ot_game_over_delay to {{ot_game_over_delay}}]
Set game over grace period to {{ot_game_over_delay}} seconds.
